text:
Transferring Current ability to transfer. 00 = Able to independently transfer
01 = Transfers with minimal human assistance or with use of an assistive device
02 = Unable to transfer self but is able to bear weight and pivot during the transfer process
03 = Unable to transfer self and is unable to bear weight or pivot when transferred by another person
04 = Bedfast, unable to transfer but is able to turn and position self in bed
05 = Bedfast, unable to transfer and is unable to turn and position
